name: chr10p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 10 p-arm pericentric flank (10p11.1-10p11.22), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr10 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D10Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
